section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report

- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)

Received stamp: LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER - 2022 FEB -8 PM 1:11 - OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES. Hand-delivered stamp at top.

Transaction grid: example row ignored. First non-example row reads "Please see the attached" with no transaction checkboxes or amount boxes marked; remaining visible rows are blank.
